value.0: Like many evil items, these robes are fashioned in great numbers by the Zhentarim and their minions. They are found far and wide across the Realms, and the more hands they touch, the more influence the Zhents enjoy.
This ring grants its wearer water elemental powers.

Like many evil items, these robes are fashioned in great numbers by the Zhentarim and their minions. They are found far and wide across the Realms, and the more hands they touch, the more influence the Zhents enjoy.
Elder Robe of the Stone Hand
Elder Robes of the Enabled Hand
Greater Robe of the Stone Hand
Master's Robe of the Stone Hand

Like many evil items, these robes are fashioned in great numbers by the Zhentarim and their minions. They are found far and wide across the Realms, and the more hands they touch, the more influence the Zhents enjoy.

Having explored the northlands extensively, a druid named Aawill commissioned the creation of these comfortable boots. Knowing he was heading for the sometimes-dangerous domain of the Neverwinter Woods, Aawill was looking for something helpful in combat, to lighten his need for armor. Since becoming the Archdruid for the Neverwinter Wood's Druid Grove, Aawill has commissioned several, more powerful versions of his original boots.

So many tales surround these axes that it is difficult to determine which are true. They have been linked to kings, celestials, dark gods, and obnoxious dwarves, but in all cases they were used to destroy some meddlesome wizard or another. Scholars suggest that the weapons were created by a single person; someone wishing either the destruction of all spellcasters, or simply the troublesome ones.
That Axe was made with one thing in mind... Killing undead.

The Serpents staff is often used by evil wizards and the such.

On every hit there is a risk that the target is afflected with one of the 2 poisons on the staff.
This blade is a weapon of a servant of Sauron. The dark lord has been up to something, if he places these creature with such weapons in wait for wood-be heroes.
A wicked looking blade of Ethereal quality.
A Morgul blade is a weapon of the Ringwraiths. To be feared always.

This upgraded version of the Club of Detonation not only helps it's weilder hit it's mark more often. 

But also Has a more intensified Impact Fire Damage.

This powerful Item was enchanted  with Electrical, Acidic and poisonous damage.

Verry deadly, and an extremely rare weapon.

This is the fully combine Spike of Ixil.

This weapon gives its weilder immunity to any spell that causes weilder to ususally slow down or be stopped. Also it has the ability to stun it's opponent.

Wave was made to kill elementals. Initially built to kill Fire Elemental beings this weapon was altered to kill all types of elementals.

This is a Unique Weapon.

The faithful teach that a Staff of the Holy is the will of a deity made manifest. While this is debatable, these items do tend to find their way to the hands of the truly righteous, by accident or design. Still, the number of these staffs in circulation makes the miraculous origin theory somewhat unlikely.

This type of staff is the pinnacle of the artificer's craft, and each one represents the culmination of decades of study by a master spellcaster. With the secrets of their creation all but lost, more such staffs are found in the horde of ancient dragons than the hands of living wizards.

Staffs of Power are immediately familiar to most spellcasters, and are almost icons of arcane study. The inherent utility of such staffs has resulted in many being crafted or commissioned, and specific histories are usually lost in the crowd.
This wand casts lightning bolt as a 10th level wizard
This Wand casts magic missiles as if it were used by a level 9 Wizard.

These potent defensive rings are much in demand in urban areas, where duels between rival spellcasters are unfortunately common. Armed with one of these items, even a relatively inexperienced caster can withstand the attack of an archmage - albeit briefly.
This ring will grant protection to it's wearer against sonic based attacks.

With This ring the wearer can survive in the plane of Elemental fire.

It also protects him/her from fire damage.

With this ring the wearer can survive in the elemental plane of Water.

It also protects him/her from Cold attacks.

With this ring the wearer can survive in the elemental plane of air.

It also grants him/her protection against electrical attacks.

Wearer of this ring can survive in the elemental plane of Earth.

Also this ring grants him/her protection vs acid attacks.
This amulet grants its wearer increased endurance.
This Magical amulet has the ability to throw magic Missiles at a target several times a day.
This amulet gives it's wearer limited form of Spell Resistance.
This amulet grants the use of Cure Critical Spell 4 times a day.
Rune Necklace of Cure Critical Wounds
It brings the power of the Storm King to your hand.
This book at a glance tells of the almighty guild, the Mages Collect.
